title: psathyrostachys fragilis
intro: Psathyrostachys fragilis, also known as Fragile Needle Grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and an antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of Psathyrostachys fragilis can be found in various forms, including tea, infusion, and decoction, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
